parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Retrieve Part value

actor User
participant libdrift

box "driftd service" #LightBlue
participant "Advertisement channel" as adv
participant "Control channel" as ctrl
participant driftd
end box

participant Neo4j
participant MongoDB

User -> libdrift : get Part value
note left
Retrieval message contains
index specifier
index value
end note
libdrift -> ctrl : send retrieval message
ctrl -> libdrift : ACK
ctrl -> driftd : get Part value
driftd -> driftd : Lookup Part UUID in index
driftd -> Neo4j : Get Part info

alt Composite Part
    loop foreach Part
        driftd -> Neo4j : Get Part metadata with UUID
        driftd -> MongoDB : Get Part values
    end
else Simple Part
    driftd -> Neo4j : Get Part metadata with UUID
    driftd -> MongoDB : Get Part values
end

driftd -> driftd : build update message
driftd -> adv : Update messages for Part values
adv -> User : receive update message

@enduml
```
